title: Astaxanthin vs Vitamin C: Which Antioxidant Is Better for Skin After 40?
seo_title: Astaxanthin vs Vitamin C for Skin After 40: Which Wins?
meta_description: Astaxanthin and vitamin C are both powerful antioxidants for aging skin. See how they compare for women over 40 and which delivers better results for your goals.
tags: Skin, Antioxidants, Astaxanthin, Vitamin C, Anti-Aging, Collagen
